title: sigsetjmp and siglongjmp Control Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the non-local jump mechanism using sigsetjmp to save a context and siglongjmp to restore to that context, including signal mask handling.
relationships: Main Program calls sigsetjmp to set a return point
Program continues normal execution after sigsetjmp
A signal can interrupt execution and trigger its handler
Signal Handler calls siglongjmp to jump back
siglongjmp returns program flow to the point after sigsetjmp
